name: chatgpt-yolo
description: Local-first queues, bounded workflows, and safety controls for ChatGPT in Chromium browsers.

scripts.check: node --check config.js && node --check lifecycle.js && node --check coordinator.js && node --check portable-store.js && node --check queue.js && node --check commands.js && node --check background.js && node --check background-wrapper.js && node --check tab-supervisor.js && node --check data-background.js && node --check portability.js && node --check platforms.js && node --check command-ui.js && node --check content.js && node --check command-runtime.js && node --check popup.js && node --check options.js && node --check options-ui.js && node --check options-portability.js && node --check onboarding.js && node --check scripts/package.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-extension.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-asset-manifest.mjs && node --check scripts/no-bare-installs.mjs
scripts.validate:core: npm run check && npm test && npm run verify:extension && node scripts/package.mjs --check && node scripts/no-bare-installs.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run validate:core && npm run validate:assets
